description: Deliberately invoked (not per-bug-ticket) orchestrator that compares a designated core baseline against 1-3 customer clones, recording which domain folders are identical/overridden/customer-only in .claude/knowledge/customers/<customer>.md, and — for a named feature — traces UI entry point -> API/handler -> DB entity/table -> emitted event into a Feature Card. Invoke with /smdg-knowledge-bootstrap <core-path> <customer-path...>.
